titleRomaji: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)
titleNative: 男女の友情は成立する？（いや、しないっ!!）
synopsis: Himari Inuzuka, a cheerful girl who's never been in love, and Yuu Natsume, a flower-loving boy, became friends by chance. Two years later, the two are still best friends. But when Yuu is reunited with his former crush, the relationship between Himari and Yuu began to change......? (Source: Dengeki Daioh, translated)

title: Hayachine!
titleNative: ハヤチネ!
synopsis: After the death of their parents, the three siblings Seiji, Kozue and Shima get taken in by their uncle and move from Tokyo to Ohasama in the countryside. Will they be able to adapt to their new life in the middle of nowhere? A lighthearted slice of life story begins...

title: Koi to Senrigan to Aonisai
titleNative: 恋と千里眼と青二才
synopsis: Chihaya Senri is a high school girl who has the power of "senrigan", the ability to see the future. One day, she received a confession of love from a young boy named Eita. She refused, saying "I can't go out with a child..." But through her senrigan, she could see herself being with Eita in the future, after he has grown into an adult! She knows he'll be the man of her dreams. But if she started dating him now, she would be committing a crime! What will happen to the relationship between a wavering JK and an eager shota? (Source: Yan Manga, translated)

title: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleRomaji: Isekai Nidome no Ossan, Dou Kangaete mo Koukousei Yuusha yori Tsuyoi
titleEnglish: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleNative: 異世界二度目のおっさん、どう考えても高校生勇者より強い
synonyms: The Old Man in His Second Time in Another World Is Somehow Stronger than the High School Hero
synopsis: Riku Takayanagi is a boring 32-year-old businessman with nothing special about him. Or so it seems. In truth, he once saved another world as a hero. Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

title: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleRomaji: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleNative: 修羅幼女の英雄譚　～半端者と言われた傭兵、幼女に転生して成り上がる～
synonyms: The Heroic Tale of Shura Young Girl: A Mercenary Who was Said to be Half-Baked is Reincarnated as a Young Girl and Rises to Success
synopsis: "If I had a second life, wouldn't I be a ‘hero’ again?" Solfort Enuma is an old soldier who has spent more than 60 years training to become a 'hero'. He was an ordinary man with no talent, but he never gave up and continued to pursue his dream. One day, Solfort faced the 'hero' he had always longed for, but his sword failed to strike a blow and he met an unrewarding end... It was supposed to happen, but Solfort found himself reincarnated as a young girl...! Now her (his) heroic tale begins, as she (he) changes her name to Sol, to once again pursue the dream that did not come true in her previous life!

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

chapterSourceTitle: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan ~Hanpa-sha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru~

title: Arte
titleNative: アルテ
synopsis: The story takes place in 16th century Florence during a time when women were relegated to the role of wives and caretakers, a young noble girl named Arte dreams of being an artist’s apprentice. One day she stumbles on the workshop of the eccentric Maestro Leo who decides to accept her as his student. Follow Arte on her journey as she discovers the joy and struggles on the path to becoming a maestro. (Source: Comikey) Note: Series resumed in June 2025 after the conclusion of the main story

title: Darwin no Taizai
titleNative: ダーウィンの大罪
synopsis: In a world shrouded in darkness, where demons run rampant, a young man named Hisago Harukawa, once forced into committing crimes under the threats of demons, sets his sights on his next target: a suspicious woman who calls herself Darwin, proponent of “Evolution.”! But this encounter changes everything, Hisago is pulled into a battle to send demons back to the depths of hell!! To survive, he must evolve. A devil-hunting fantasy of atonement begins!!!

title: Zankyou
titleNative: 残響
synopsis: Satoru spends his days listlessly in a factory town. The old man Segawa, a former Yakuza, lives in the room next to his cheap apartment. One day, Segawa tells Satoru, "I'll give you 5 million yen to put me out of my misery". Satoru hesitates, and Segawa sees through to the madness eating away inside him and begins to have a change of heart, and yet...!? A story of the filth of society and the dark path that Satoru takes, on the edge of sanity, with a gun and 5 million yen.

title: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleRomaji: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleNative: 終末なにしてますか? 忙しいですか? 救ってもらっていいですか?
synopsis: Five hundred years have passed since humanity went extinct at the hands of the fearsome "Beasts." Even up in the sky, where the surviving races dwell on floating islands, these monstrosities constantly threaten to bring death and destruction. Only a small group of young girls, the Leprechauns, can wield the ancient weapons needed to defeat these creatures. Into the girls' unstable and fleeting lives, where a call to certain death could come at any moment, enters an unlikely character: a young man who lost everything five hundred years ago, the last living human awakened from a long, icy slumber...

titleNative: ライスショルダー
synopsis: The story revolves around a 202-pound, 18-year old girl named Okome Akino (whose name is a pun of "autumn rice"). After Okome enters a sumo match and wins against a male amateur fighter by a landslide, a trainer named Akane scouts her, and she enters the world of women's boxing. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: King in Limbo
titleNative: リンボ・ザ・キング
synonyms: リンボ ザ キング
synopsis: It's been eight years since the pandemic in which a deadly sleeping sickness claimed millions of lives. After a serious injury cost him a leg (and, nearly, his life), Petty Officer Adam Garfield retires from active service in the U.S. Navy. But his plan to focus on his family and physical therapy is shattered when he receives secret word that the sleeping sickness has returned, and it's his job to bring back the mysterious man who helped cure it by diving into people's memories—a man known by the codename "King." (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Aishite Hoshii no wa Ore ja Nai noni!: BL Game no Akuyaku Reisoku ni Tensei Shita noni Kirawarenakute Komattemasu
titleRomaji: Aishite Hoshii no wa Ore ja Nai noni!: BL Game no Akuyaku Reisoku ni Tensei Shita noni Kirawarenakute Komattemasu
titleNative: 愛してほしいのは俺じゃないのに！ 〜BLゲームの悪役令息に転生したのに嫌われなくて困ってます〜
synopsis: One day, Arthur realizes that he’s been reincarnated as the villain in a BL game. On top of that, he remembers that based on the plot of the game, he only has endings like the “Imprisonment Ending” and “Tentacle Ending” waiting for him! With no other option to save his chastity and life, his only way out is getting his fiancée to get with the protagonist! Dragging along his trusty servant Edgar, he tries to craft up schemes to get the two of them together. But, rather than being hated as the villain, he starts raising BL flags of his own?! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 機動戦士ガンダムSEED ECLIPSE

This is the story of an interval. A story that takes place between two large wars in which members of a hollow unit known as ODR risked their lives.

title: The King's Avatar
titleNative: 全职高手
synopsis: No one could ever come close to “Battle God” Ye Qiu’s skills in Glory, a popular game that took the world by storm. His professional team, however, replaced him with another captain, and even seized his account. He was left to start anew at an internet cafe as a manager. When a new District 10 opened up in Glory, he dives back, armed with a decade of experience and an unfinished custom weapon. His path to redemption, filled with strategy and memories, marks his thrilling return to the summit. (Source: Tapas)
